A category is preadditive if it is enriched over the monoidal category
A preadditive category is additive if every finite set of objects has a biproduct
An additive category is preabelian if every morphism has both a kernel and a cokernel
a preabelian category is abelian if every monomorphism and every epimorphism is normal
